scripts.test: bun load-files && bun build:npm && bun test:parser && bun test:codegen && bun test:sourcemap
scripts.build:npm: napi build --release && zig build gen-estree-decoder && cp ./zig-out/decode.js ./npm/yuku-parser && zig build gen-estree-encoder && cp ./zig-out/encode.js ./npm/yuku-codegen
scripts.build:wasm: zig build wasm && zig build gen-estree-decoder && zig build gen-estree-encoder && cp ./zig-out/bin/yuku-parser.wasm ./zig-out/decode.js ./npm/yuku-parser-wasm/ && cp ./npm/yuku-parser/index.d.ts ./npm/yuku-parser-wasm/ && cp ./zig-out/bin/yuku-codegen.wasm ./zig-out/encode.js ./npm/yuku-codegen-wasm/
